_comment: Named SIEM/SOAR delivery destinations for RedactWall security events. Each event is prompt-free. type is one of: splunk_hec, sentinel, chronicle, qradar, datadog, slack, teams, otlp, webhook. url must be HTTPS. token/customerId/logType are per-type auth. For 'otlp' the url is the collector base (events POST to <url>/v1/logs), token becomes an Authorization: Bearer header, and optional serviceName sets the OTel resource service.name; the collector must accept OTLP/HTTP with JSON (no protobuf/gRPC/gzip). minRisk/minSeverity/eventTypes filter which events are delivered (special event types: 'digest' for the daily summary, 'SENSOR_STALE' for sensors silent past the 48h fleet threshold). Delivery is async with retry + backoff; outcomes appear in the console delivery dashboard.
